Who We Are

A firm built on military precision, trusted by those for whom security is not optional.

Our Heritage

Sangnoir Risk Management was established in 2011 by distinguished former members of the UK Armed Forces. From its inception, the firm has operated internationally, specialising in bespoke protection and risk management solutions tailored to meet the unique needs of each individual and organisation.

Our mission is singular: to deliver client-focused protection and risk management services of the highest standard. We remain committed to staying at the forefront of innovation within the protection and risk management sector, continuously refining our methods and capabilities.

Through our global network of former security professionals, we maintain the depth of expertise, operational reach, and responsiveness that our clients expect.

2011 Established
Global Operations
Military Heritage
Bespoke Solutions

Our Values

The principles that guide every engagement and define our standard of service.

Discretion

Confidentiality is the foundation of every client relationship. We operate with absolute discretion in all matters.

Precision

Every detail is considered, every contingency planned for. Our approach is methodical and thorough.

Authority

Our expertise is earned through decades of service in the most demanding operational environments.

Professionalism

We uphold the highest standards of conduct, appearance, and operational excellence at all times.

Leadership

Danny Barnard

Founder & Director

Danny Barnard founded Sangnoir Risk Management in 2011, drawing upon a distinguished career within the UK Armed Forces. His operational experience spans some of the most complex and demanding security environments in the world.

Under his leadership, Sangnoir has grown to become a trusted partner for governments, royal households, and global business leaders who require the highest calibre of protection and risk management services.

Danny maintains an active role in all aspects of the firm's operations, ensuring that each client engagement receives the personal attention and strategic oversight that defines the Sangnoir standard.

Our Approach

Every engagement follows a disciplined methodology refined through years of operational experience.

01

Assess

Comprehensive threat and risk assessment tailored to the client's profile, environment, and requirements.

02

Plan

Detailed operational planning covering personnel deployment, logistics, communications, and contingencies.

03

Deploy

Execution by experienced professionals who operate with precision, discretion, and complete situational awareness.

04

Monitor

Continuous review of threat intelligence and operational effectiveness, with real-time adaptation as required.

Our Clientele

We serve those for whom security is a matter of necessity, not preference.

Ambassadors Diplomats UK & International Special Envoys Members of the British Royal Family Members of the Saudi Royal Family Members of Parliament Global Business Leaders Ultra-High-Net-Worth Individuals

Discuss Your Requirements

All enquiries are treated with the strictest confidence.
